name: Take It Gandalf!
text: Setup: Put objective-hero Gandalf into play and attach The One Ring to him, Tempting side faceup. Use The Mirror of Galadriel - Shire encounter set to build the encounter deck. Flip this card over and add it to the staging area.

name: Take It Gandalf!
text: Each character with the Hobbit trait gets +1 hit point. Forced: After a Shire location is explored, place X [threat] tokens here, where X is its printed [threat].

name: A New Dark Lord
text: Setup: Set aside the Gandalf enemy from The Mirror of Galadriel - Gandlaf encounter set. Shuffle the remaining cards of that encounter set together to create the Villain deck. Flip this card over and add it to the staging area.

name: A New Dark Lord
text: Forced: After The One Ring exhausts, add 1 [threat] token to A New Dark Lord. When Villain is Revealed: Discard the Ring-lord. Attach The One Ring to Gandalf the Black, Claimed side faceup. Flip the encounter deck over so the top card is always visible to all players.

name: Gandalf
text: The first player gains control of Gandalf. Play with the top card of your deck faceup. Response: After Gandalf quests sucessfully, choose 1: Reduce your threat by 1, deal 1 damage to an enemy in play, or draw 1 card.

name: Brandywall
text: While Brandywall is your active location, you must choose to optionally engage enemies you reveal through Siege of Middle-earth’s Forced effect, if able. Forced: When Brandywall is explored, the Ring-lord player either exhausts The One Ring or reveals an encounter card.

name: Bridge Gate
text: Forced: After Bridge Gate is explored, each player retreats 2.

name: Green-hill Country
text: Travel: Raise your threat by 3 for each hero you control with 3 or more hit points.

name: South Farthing
text: While South Farthing is your active location, your heroes gain the Hobbit trait. Travel: Raise your threat by 2.

name: East Farthing
text: Travel: Raise your threat by 2. The Ring-lord player may exhaust The One Ring to have you search your deck for a non-unique Weapon or Armor attachment, attach it to an eligible character you control, and shuffle your deck.

name: North Farthing
text: Travel: Name a card type and discard the top card of your deck. If it is not the named type, raise your threat by 5.

name: West Farthing
text: While West Farthing is your active location, each time you retreat X also deal X damage among characters you control. Travel: Raise your threat by 2.

name: The Hill
text: If the round number is 5 or 6, the next player with an opportunity to travel must travel here, if able. Forced: Some effect.

name: Corsairs from the West
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck for a location (a West location if possible), attach it to an enemy (a Corsair enemy if possible) as a guarded location, and shuffle the encounter deck. Keep this card attached to the location as long as it’s guarded. It gains the text: “Forced: At the beginning of the combat phase, the engaged player pays the attached location’s Travel cost.”

name: Wraiths from the North
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck for a location (a North location if possible), attach it to an enemy (an Undead or Nazgûl enemy if possible) as a guarded location, and shuffle the encounter deck. Keep this card attached to the location as long as it’s guarded. It gains the text: “Forced: At the beginning of the combat phase, the engaged player pays the attached location’s Travel cost.”

name: Dunlendings from the South
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck for a location (a South location if possible), attach it to an enemy (a Dunlending enemy if possible) as a guarded location, and shuffle the encounter deck. Keep this card attached to the location as long as it’s guarded. It gains the text: “Forced: At the beginning of the combat phase, the engaged player pays the attached location’s Travel cost.”

name: Wolves from the East
text: When Revealed: Search the encounter deck for a location (a East location if possible), attach it to an enemy (a Creature enemy if possible) as a guarded location, and shuffle the encounter deck. Keep this card attached to the location as long as it’s guarded. It gains the text: “Forced: At the beginning of the combat phase, the engaged player pays the attached location’s Travel cost.”

name: Gandalf the Black
text: X is 10 plus 6[pp]. G is equal to the number of letters in the title of the top card of the encounter deck. Forced: When Gandalf the Black attacks, continue dealing shadow cards until 3 shadow cards with shadow effects have been dealt to him. When Gandalf the Black is destroyed, the players win the game.

name: Like the Dark Lord Himself
text: If the effect below is canceled, the player who revealed this card raises their threat by G and no other ’when revealed’ effects can be canceled this round. When Revealed: The player who revealed this card attaches it to the hero they control with the most letters in their title. Attached character gains turncoat.

name: A Power Still Greater
text: If the effect below is canceled, the player who revealed this card raises their threat by G and no other ’when revealed’ effects can be canceled this round. When Revealed: Gandalf the Black makes an immediate attack against a hero controlled by the player who revealed this card. After dealing shadow cards for this attack, put A Power Still Greater on top of the encounter deck.

name: Pity for Weakness
text: If the effect below is canceled, the player who revealed this card raises their threat by G and no other ’when revealed’ effects can be canceled this round. When Revealed: The player who revealed this card deals G damage among characters they control. Until the end of the round, characters that player controls cannot gain hit points from card effects.

name: Strength to Do Good
text: If the effect below is canceled, the player who revealed this card raises their threat by G and no other ’when revealed’ effects can be canceled this round. When Revealed: Resolve the following effect G times: The player who revealed this card chooses 1: Raise their threat by 3, deal 1 damage to a hero they control, or discard 1 random card from their hand.
